allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''$f'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''  name:'', j.name\); console.log\(''  nodes:'', j.nodes.length\); j.nodes.forEach\(n => console.log\(''    -'', n.name, ''|'', n.type, ''v''+n.typeVersion\)\); console.log\(''  connections:'', Object.keys\(j.connections\).length\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const j=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''n8n-workflows/00_agent_main_v3.json'',''utf8''\)\); console.log\(''Valid JSON: YES''\); console.log\(''Nodes:'', j.nodes.length\); console.log\(''Connections:'', Object.keys\(j.connections\).length\); const claudeNode=j.nodes.find\(n=>n.name===''Claude → Decide Workflow''\); const body=claudeNode.parameters.jsonBody; console.log\(''Has top-level system:'', body.includes\(""system:""\)\); console.log\(''Has role system in messages:'', body.includes\(""role: ''system''""\)\); console.log\(''Has role system in messages \(alt\):'', body.includes\(''role: ""system""''\)\); const parseNode=j.nodes.find\(n=>n.name===''Parse Decision''\); console.log\(''Parse has DEFAULT_CATEGORY:'', parseNode.parameters.jsCode.includes\(''DEFAULT_CATEGORY''\)\); console.log\(''Parse has VALID array:'', parseNode.parameters.jsCode.includes\(""VALID""\)\); j.nodes.forEach\(n=>{if\(n.parameters.options!==undefined\)console.log\(''WARNING: options found on'',n.name\)}\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\(''fs''\); const files = [''n8n-workflows/06_competitor_monitor.json'',''n8n-workflows/07_review_responder.json'',''n8n-workflows/08_daily_digest.json'',''n8n-workflows/09_seo_content_writer.json'',''n8n-workflows/10_error_monitor.json'',''n8n-workflows/11_onboarding_sequence.json'',''n8n-workflows/12_pinecone_rag.json'']; files.forEach\(f => { try { const d = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(f,''utf8''\)\); const s = JSON.stringify\(d\); const hasAuth = s.includes\(''""authentication""''\) || s.includes\(''""genericAuthType""''\) || s.includes\(''""credentials""''\); const hasEnv = s.includes\(''$env.''\); console.log\(f + '': VALID JSON | auth_removed='' + !hasAuth + '' | env_removed='' + !hasEnv\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(f + '': INVALID - '' + e.message\); } }\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const files=[''06_competitor_monitor.json'',''07_review_responder.json'',''08_daily_digest.json'',''09_seo_content_writer.json'',''10_error_monitor.json'',''11_onboarding_sequence.json'',''12_pinecone_rag.json'']; files.forEach\(f => { try { const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Users/ASUS/all-in-one-suite/n8n-workflows/''+f,''utf8''\)\); const t=d.nodes.find\(n=>n.id===''trigger''\); console.log\(f+'': type=''+t.type+'' webhookId=''+t.webhookId\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(f+'': ERROR ''+e.message\); } }\);")
